channel.title: NRIBeat — Daily Pulse for Indian Americans
channel.description: Immigration, AI, Cricket, Bollywood, and Layoffs — curated daily for the Indian-American community.

item.title: Yash Chopra Foundation Scholarship 2026: Rs. 5 Lakhs for Film Industry Kids
item.description: Yash Raj Films' Yash Chopra Foundation has launched its second YCF Scholarship Program 2026, offering up to Rs. 5 lakhs to children of Hindi film industry workers for higher education. Applications open in 2026 for the 2026–27 academic year; interested families should check YRF's official website and social channels for deadlines and eligibility details.

item.title: Gen Z AI Skepticism Rising: What It Means for Your Tech Career [2026]
item.description: Gen Z uses AI weekly but skepticism is rising—and this shift creates new demand for engineers who can build trustworthy, explainable AI systems. Indian tech professionals who pivot from "using AI faster" to "building AI responsibly" will see salary premiums of 15-25% and stronger visa sponsorship positioning in 2026.

item.title: ICC Expands WTC 2025: One-Test Series Now Allowed
item.description: The ICC is expanding the World Test Championship to include single-Test bilateral series in the next cycle, giving cricket boards (including India) more scheduling flexibility. This means more India cricket matches to follow, more unpredictable WTC standings, and a packed calendar balancing Test cricket with the IPL 2025. For US-based fans, expect more India cricket live score updates and unusual match timings throughout the year.

item.title: India Cricket Tour: Lister Called Up After Clarke Injury
item.description: India's cricket squad faces a reshuffle as fast bowler Lister gets called up to replace injured Clarke for the Bangladesh tour. With Ben Sears unavailable for the ODI leg due to PSL commitments, India tests its bench strength ahead of the ICC Champions Trophy 2025. For US-based Indian cricket fans, watch how Lister performs and catch live scores on Willow TV and streaming platforms.

item.title: Mukul Choudhary IPL 2026: Cricket's Helicopter Shot Sensation
item.description: Mukul Choudhary, an MS Dhoni fanboy dominating IPL 2026, practices 100-150 sixes daily and has made the helicopter shot his signature weapon. His dedicated training regime is translating into explosive match performances that have caught selectors' attention for future Indian cricket squads.

item.title: EB-2 India Priority Date April 2026: What Changed?
item.description: EB-2 India's priority date remains frozen at July 15, 2014 in the April 2026 Visa Bulletin. Indian professionals with priority dates on or before this date can now pursue green card processing; those with later dates face 11+ year waits. Monitor the May bulletin and take immediate action if your case becomes current.

item.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
item.description: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

item.title: Patlytics AI Patent Tool: $40M Funding & Impact on Indian Tech Lawyers
item.description: Patlytics, a legal AI startup, just raised $40M and is reshaping how law firms work—creating high-paying career opportunities for Indian software engineers in legal tech. AI tools for developers are moving beyond chat into specialized domains where salaries start at $180K+. If you're an ML engineer or full-stack developer, this is your moment to pivot into legal AI before the talent pool catches up.

item.title: Salman Khan's Sanam Bewafa Re-releases April 10, 2026
item.description: Salman Khan's 1991 cult classic Sanam Bewafa re-releases in US theaters April 10, 2026, riding the wave of nostalgia-driven theatrical returns. The film won't be on Netflix or Prime Video yet, but is worth a big-screen visit for Bollywood fans seeking authentic 90s cinema.

item.title: EB-2 India May 2026 Visa Bulletin Prediction: Expect Moderate Forward Movement
item.description: EB-2 India will likely advance 10-26 days in May 2026 to approximately July 25 - August 10, 2014, continuing the stable monthly pattern of recent months. Retrogression risk remains low for now, but monitor July 2026 carefully as the fiscal year enters its final quarter.

item.title: Bangladesh Cricket Salary Hike 2026: What It Means for India Cricket
item.description: Bangladesh's new BCB leadership under Tamim Iqbal has raised domestic cricket salaries for men and women—a first move signaling long-term investment in regional talent. For India cricket fans in the US, this means stronger opponents and more competitive South Asian cricket ahead. This shapes the broader cricket ecosystem beyond just IPL 2025 and India vs Australia Test series.

item.title: India Cricket Schedule 2026: Bangladesh Changes Game Times for Energy
item.description: Bangladesh's cricket board is shifting match timings to save energy—a move that could influence how India cricket matches are scheduled globally. For NRI fans in the US, this means staying flexible with watch times for India vs Australia, IPL 2025, and bilateral series. Check Willow TV and streaming apps for updated schedules.

item.title: Ananya Panday's 'Pressure Ko Bolo Bye' Campaign 2025
item.description: Ananya Panday and Nick India have launched 'Pressure Ko Bolo Bye,' a mental health campaign helping Indian families manage exam stress through playful, open conversations. Available free on YouTube and via Disney+ Hotstar, it's a meaningful departure from traditional Bollywood content, directly addressing the pressure many Indian students and parents face during exam season.

item.title: Love & War 2026: Bhansali's Strict Security on Ranbir-Alia Set
item.description: Sanjay Leela Bhansali is keeping Love & War under extreme security with no-phones policies on set. The 2026 film starring Ranbir Kapoor, Alia Bhatt, and Vicky Kaushal is one of Bollywood's most anticipated projects. Expect a theatrical release with OTT arrival 6-8 weeks later.

item.title: EB-2 India May 2026 Visa Bulletin Prediction: Expect Modest Forward Movement
item.description: EB-2 India is expected to move 14-18 days forward in May 2026, bringing the Final Action Date to approximately July 29–August 2, 2026. Retrogression risk remains very low at 8%, with the real danger zone emerging in July-September 2026.

item.title: Bumrah & Mumbai Indians Stunned by Sooryavanshi in IPL 2025
item.description: Yashasvi Jaiswal and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi smashed Mumbai Indians in IPL 2025, leaving even Bumrah rattled in Guwahati. This match proves India's young batting talent is ready for the biggest stages. Here's how to watch India cricket highlights from the US.

item.title: Molineux Captaincy Call: T20 World Cup Will Be the Real Test
item.description: Molineux's captaincy is a high-stakes gamble that will be validated or questioned based solely on T20 World Cup results. Selector Flegler backs him despite injury concerns, confirming his bowling return is on schedule. For Indian cricket fans tracking 2026's biggest moments, this is a captaincy story that'll define the entire tournament cycle.

item.title: AI Tools for Developers 2026: Top ChatGPT Alternatives
item.description: The AI tools landscape for developers has matured in 2026. ChatGPT alternatives like Claude, Cursor, and Copilot X now dominate specialized workflows. Indian engineers proficient with 3+ AI tools report 12-18% higher salaries and faster promotions. Learning these tools is measurable career leverage.

item.title: Cameron Green Set to Bowl in KKR vs LSG IPL 2026 Match
item.description: Cameron Green is finally bowling again for KKR in IPL 2026 against LSG on Thursday. This is huge for KKR's squad balance, which has been damaged by injuries all season. Green's return as a dual-threat all-rounder could be the turning point the team needs. US-based fans can catch the action on Willow TV or Sling TV.

item.title: How to Scale AI Projects from Pilot to Production in 2025 [2026]
item.description: Most enterprise AI projects fail not because of bad tools, but because companies let pilots sprawl without discipline or production timelines. MassMutual and Mass General Brigham achieved 30% productivity gains and cut help desk resolution from 11 to 1 minute by standardizing tools, defining metrics, and deploying to production—not extending pilots forever. For Indian software engineers, this signals demand for engineers who can move AI from chaos to production, which directly impacts compensation and career growth in 2025.
